SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: THE CAUSE COMES ON THIS MORNING AS REGULARLY SCHEDULED FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL AND TRIAL DE NOVO, WITH THE COURT, LISTED PARTIES, AND COURTROOM PERSONNEL PRESENT. THE COURT TAKES THE BENCH AND ENTERTAINS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES; EXHIBITS FOR BOTH THE APPELLANT(S) AND THE RESPONDENT(S) ARE RECEIVED BY THE COURT FOR READING AND REVIEW DURING THE PROCEEDINGS; THEREUPON, AFTER HEARING ALL EVIDENCE PRESENTED AND RECEIVING EVIDENCE, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION (PRO TEM JUDGE DIANA KRUZE; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525).
